name: Sage Accounting
description: Sage Business Cloud Accounting for financial management and reporting

config.setupInstructions:
1. Register your app at developer.sage.com
2. Complete the OAuth2 authorization flow
3. Paste the access token below

credentialFields.helpText: Sage Developer Portal → My Apps → OAuth Access Token
